name: Deepak Fertilisers And Petrochemicals Corporation Limited
summary: Deepak Fertilisers And Petrochemicals Corporation Limited produces and sells fertilizers and industrial chemicals in India. It operates through Chemicals, Bulk Fertilisers, Realty, and Others segments. The Chemicals segment offers ammonia, methanol, dilute nitric acid, concentrated nitric acid, carbon dioxide, technical ammonium nitrate, iso-propyl alcohol, propane, and bulk and specialty chemicals. The Bulk Fertilisers segment provides nitro phosphate, muriate of potash, di-ammonium phosphate AP, ammonium sulphate, mixtures, single super phosphate, sulphur, micronutrients, SSF, bio fertilizers, fruits, vegetables, and pesticides. The Realty segment is involved in the real estate business. The Others segment generates electricity through windmills. The company primarily exports its products to South Asia, South East Asia, East and West Africa, and the Middle East. Deepak Fertilisers And Petrochemicals Corporation Limited was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Pune, India.
